name: Project Context headline scenario — attached spec surfaces in the run trace and finding (AC-35)
description: From PR #484 (seeded diff that imports db/ directly from api/), open the Agent runs tab and confirm the seeded Security Reviewer run shows the grounded finding referencing the architecture-invariant violation. Then open that run's trace and confirm the attached spec path (specs/architecture.md) appears under 'Specs read' and the wrapped invariant text is visible in the Prompt assembly 'Project context — attached specs (untrusted)' block. agent-browser has no LLM, so this run/trace is seeded pre-baked (matching exactly what a live run-executor pass injects) rather than produced live — see docs/plans/project-context.md Risk R-8. Read-only seeded data (no model call). Assumes a freshly-seeded DB where acme/payments-api is the first (only) repo — guaranteed by e2e-web.yml; run locally via the hermetic stack (see e2e/README.md).

cmd: Query the database directly from the public API layer
steps.label: seeded invariant-violation PR title row is visible

cmd: Query the database directly from the public API layer
steps.label: open the seeded invariant-violation PR row
navigate to the PR detail route
switch to the Agent runs tab
findings tab is active in the URL
seeded run accordion shows the agent name
seeded run accordion shows its verdict

cmd: api/ imports db/ directly, violating the architecture invariant
steps.label: the grounded finding referencing the violation is visible
trace configuration shows the Specs read row
the attached spec path is listed under specs_read
the injected spec text (the invariant itself) is visible in the untrusted block
